name: INNOSPEC INC.
summary: Innospec Inc. develops, manufactures, blends, markets and supplies specialty chemicals across three segments: Performance Chemicals (personal care, home care, agrochemical, construction, mining markets), Fuel Specialties (additives for diesel, jet, marine, fuel oil improving efficiency and reducing emissions), and Oilfield Services (chemicals for drilling, completion, production and drag reducing agents). The company serves customers in the Americas, Europe, Middle East, Africa and Asia-Pacific, and claims to be the world's only producer of tetra ethyl lead for aviation gasoline.

products.name: Fuel Additives
products.description: Specialty chemical additives for diesel, jet, marine, fuel oil improving fuel efficiency, engine performance and reducing harmful emissions.

products.name: AvGas (tetra ethyl lead)
products.description: Tetra ethyl lead product for aviation gasoline; Innospec claims to be the world's only producer.

products.name: Performance Chemicals
products.description: Mild surfactants, emollients, silicones and surfactants for personal care, home care, agrochemical, construction and mining markets.

products.name: Drag Reducing Agents (DRA)
products.description: Chemical agents that make oil and gas exploration and production more cost-efficient and environmentally friendly.

products.name: Oilfield Chemicals
products.description: Chemical solutions for drilling, completion, production including friction modifiers, biocide formulations and drilling mud additives.
